markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off the new UB blog project and align on scope and timelines.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**MVP for Q4 Launch:** To meet the aggressive timeline, the launch will be an MVP focused on core blog functionality. The more complex mixed-content card layout is deferred to V2.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [**Automated Card Descriptions:** Article cards will auto-populate descriptions from a new "content summary" field in WordPress. This field will become mandatory for all new content to ensure consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [**Streamlined Naming:** The blog name will be decided asynchronously by Nicole and Stef, skipping a meeting to accelerate progress.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [**Project Management:** Justin will create an Asana project to track tasks, and weekly syncs will begin in two weeks to maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)

## Topics

### Scope & Wireframe Review

  - [Justin reviewed the scope and wireframe from GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
      - [Homepage with a featured article and topic categories.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
      - [Category pages filtering articles by topic.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [Article pages using the existing sticky Table of Contents (ToC) template, plus new elements:](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
          - [Author box](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
          - [Related resources section](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
          - [Customizable CTA cards](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
          - [Breadcrumbs](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

### Content Card Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The wireframe's card descriptions are missing from current articles.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [**Solution:** Auto-populate descriptions from a new "content summary" field in WordPress.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This field is already being added to new content and is valuable for LLM/AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
      - [**Implementation:** The field will become mandatory for new content to ensure all cards have a description.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [**Card Design:**](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [Two distinct card types will be used:](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
        1.  [**Blog Article Cards:** For free, fully accessible content.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
        2.  [**Resource Cards:** For gated content from the Resource Center.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
      - [**Goal:** Make resource cards visually distinct to drive lead generation.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)

### Timelines & MVP Strategy

  - [**Challenge:** A Q4 launch is aggressive and depends on rapid design and development.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [**Solution:** Launch an MVP to de-risk the timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
      - [**V1 (Q4 MVP):** Core blog functionality only.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
      - [**V2 (Jan/Feb):** Add the complex mixed-content card layout.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [**Development:** Kevin's team can start building the existing article template asynchronously while designs are finalized.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)

### Blog Naming & Copy

  - [**Naming Process:** Nicole and Stef will decide the blog name asynchronously.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This streamlines decision-making to accelerate the project.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
      - [**Consideration:** The name should be ownable and work for future localization.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [**Copy Needs:**](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
      - [Blog name](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
      - [SEO blurbs for category pages](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
      - ["Content summary" for all articles](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [**Workflow:** Justin will draft copy for Nicole's review.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Justin:**](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
      - [Update scope doc with card strategy, related resource logic, and MVP plan.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
      - [Create an Asana project to track all tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
      - [Cancel the Monday naming meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
      - [Schedule recurring weekly syncs starting in two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [**Nicole & Stef:**](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [Decide on the blog name asynchronously.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [**Kristina:**](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [Deliver initial mock-ups (homepage, category page, cards) in two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [**Kevin:**](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
      - [Begin asynchronous development of the existing article template.](https://fathom.video/share/MNj-587a2Rs1dNbvAKRTUxxzEUytMs3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
